evidence: reports/plans/RQ014_envelope_builder_contract_v2.json#/scene_anchor_domain_contract/available_group now requires set(path_type_or_NA) cardinality exactly 1 and requires its sole CP/HO/MP/F value to equal the exact checksum-bound WOD lookup for the segment's frozen (segment_id,tstar_context_step). The companion path_type_group_invariant binds the same value across every AVAILABLE feature/horizon group for that segment and maps any mismatch to FATAL_ANCHOR_DOMAIN_INTEGRITY_ERROR.

The same AVAILABLE-group rule preserves the independent TF invariant: set(h_common_tick_or_NA) has cardinality exactly 1 with one finite integer, while every non-TF row uses literal NA. Mixed AVAILABLE/terminal groups, missing groups, and duplicate groups remain fatal.

tests/test_rq014_recovery_lane_v2_contract.py:test_stat4_m01_membership_bytes_are_reversible_beyond_the_aggregate now validates both conditions mechanically: same-valued CP and HO fixtures pass only when they match the frozen lookup; a mixed CP/HO group and a homogeneous group that disagrees with the lookup both fail.

required_envelope_queries.csv has one checksum-bound derivation from valid AVAILABLE scene rows. Each scene-feature-horizon group contributes only to its single lookup-bound path-type branch, terminal rows contribute to none, and the unique aggregate group-by retains feature_id,path_type,horizon_id,tau_tick,h_common_tick_or_NA. Thus the round-5 path-type ambiguity cannot alter envelope lookup, deviation, association, rank, freeze, or replay while satisfying the frozen contract.
findings.summary: The round-5 AVAILABLE-group path-type and lookup-binding defect is closed, including TF h_common single-valuedness and unique per-scene-to-aggregate routing.

evidence: The closed-window contract slices each exact registered position interval before deriving velocity, acceleration, and heading; derivative halos and cross-window state reuse are forbidden. CH and TP consume no observed position after tau, LF/HF consume only their declared closed windows, and TF consumes only [0,H_common].

H20 is all-or-none. HFEAS is a filtered subset of the finite integer interval rate_hz..h_common_tick, requires complete H20 support, and explicitly bounds TF anchors by h_common_tick even though the TF position window is tau-invariant; every AVAILABLE group therefore has finite membership and a unique last tau.

Independent Cartesian enumeration reproduced 16 unique feature families, 48 feature-envelope executions, 960 predictor cells, and 2,880 unique association rows. The 31 upstream statuses and (stage,reason_priority) pairs are unique.

RWS, PSP, and PPR share one scene/candidate mask within a cell; exact binary64 tie rules, scene-equal weighting, typed missing metrics, fold/LOO/LOCO/shard recomputation, and the 2,000 intact-scene bootstrap are single-valued. BM90/BT90 retain exact path, horizon/tau, and TF h_common dimensions and use a fixed episode bootstrap.

The canonical append-only 2,880-row ledger, total ranking, rank-1-only freeze rule, selected-recipe binding, and clean replay prohibit early stopping, manual substitution, rank-2 fallback, screen-cache reuse, or reinterpretation of the frozen per-scene anchor domain.
findings.summary: Time-window/HFEAS semantics, enumeration, associations, envelopes, bootstrap, ledger, ranking, freeze, and replay are internally single-valued.

evidence: reports/plans/RQ014_recovery_lane_v2.json explicitly registers STAT4-m01: scenario_cluster=NA scenes remain in native support but are not a LOCO cluster, and recovery_compatible adds neither an NA-share ceiling nor a leave-all-NA omission.

Five-fold, leave-one-scene-out, named non-NA cluster omission, source-shard omission, common-support sensitivity, and intact-scene uncertainty remain required. The objective is limited to historical specification recovery on the same frozen rated479 dataset, not independent replication, causal inference, or generalization.

The selected recipe must be independently replayed from authorized source inputs, but the data are the same frozen dataset; publication or external-validity claims beyond that boundary remain forbidden. This is therefore a bounded accepted residual rather than an unresolved major.
findings.summary: The registered scenario_cluster=NA LOCO limitation and same-dataset recovery boundary remain accepted residuals.

evidence: The candidate manifest has exactly 68 LF-terminated entries and SHA-256 e8cda2e2fbe7e5a1f79f27ba64eb751b02d462ff5147d593245fd2c860bccdec; all 68 listed files matched their registered SHA-256 values, covering 1,321,462 bytes.

Read-only structural checks strictly parsed 22 JSON files with duplicate-key and nonfinite-value rejection, parsed 6 YAML files, parsed/compiled 15 Python files, passed bash syntax for 6 shell/sbatch files, and passed git diff --check.
The eight focused RQ014 suites passed 194 tests in 15.78 seconds under Python 3.9.6. No rating value or raw rated TFRecord was accessed, no HPC connection was made, and no Slurm job was submitted.
findings.summary: Exact-byte, structural, enumeration, and focused regression verification passed without exposing rating data or using HPC.
